items.caption: A tall, clear glass bottle with a dark blue cap, filled with a bright red liquid, which appears to be a type of alcohol. the label on the bottle is predominantly white with black and red text, featuring the brand name "bitterol" in large, bold letters at the top. below the brand name, there is a circular emblem with a red background and a white border, containing a red and white design that could be a logo or emblem. the text on the label also includes "alcohol by volume 40%," indicating the strength of the alcohol, and "made in italy," suggesting the country of origin. the background of the image is plain white, emphasizing the product. the style of the image is a straightforward product photograph, likely intended for commercial or retail purposes.
